description.value:
[reaction] Archetype

Trigger A creature you are aware of makes an attack roll against you.

Your Observation Haki senses the intent of the attack a split second before it lands. You read the attacker's killing intent and shift your footing at the last moment. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

If the attack still hits despite this bonus, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your saving throw against any effect the attack delivers (such as a poison, condition, or spell).
